title: Greek Baklava
description: A classic Greek pastry dessert made with layers of phyllo and nuts, held together with a sweet honey syrup.
instructions: Thaw the phyllo dough according to package instructions.
Mix together the mediterranean ingredients and set aside.
Layer 5-6 sheets of phyllo in a 9x13 inch baking dish, brushing each sheet with melted butter.
Sprinkle 1/4 cup of the mediterranean ingredients over the phyllo layer.
Repeat the phyllo and mediterranean layers 3 more times, ending with a layer of phyllo on top.
Cut the baklava into diamond-shaped pieces and bake for 45 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the baklava is baking, prepare the honey syrup by mixing together 1 cup of honey and 1 cup of water in a saucepan.
Bring the honey syrup to a boil over medium heat, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove the baklava from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Drizzle the honey syrup over the baklava and serve warm.
